name: FN57 | 暗夜聚合
descriptionEn: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. This custom paint job makes the weapon look like it is made of a transparent purple polymer. Wrapped in a purple candy shell
descriptionZh: 拥有极高的精准度，能穿透护甲，价格昂贵的 FN57 换弹时间较慢，作为补偿，它具有设计巧妙的 20 发子弹和较低的后坐力。 这把武器的定制涂装使其看起来像是由透明紫色聚合物制成。 裹在紫色糖果外壳之中
